context_summary: Alpha da hoan thanh toan bo architecture design cho Phase 1-3. Beta can doc API_CONTRACT.md va DATABASE_SCHEMA.md trong agents/shared/ de bat dau implement backend. Schema SQL da san sang cho PostgreSQL 16 + pgvector. Qdrant collection config co int8 quantization. API contract co 15 endpoints voi SSE streaming format chi tiet.

constraints.memory_limit_mb: Backend process: 500MB limit. Ollama: 6500MB total (nomic 300MB + gemma2 1600MB always loaded). Phase 1 chi dung gemma2, KHONG load llama3.1 hoac reranker.
constraints.dependencies: PostgreSQL 16 + pgvector extension, Qdrant running, Ollama voi nomic-embed-text + gemma2:2b pulled, Redis (Phase 2+)
constraints.blockers: Khong co blocker. Epsilon can setup Docker truoc khi Beta test tren containers.

acceptance_criteria: FastAPI app khoi dong duoc, /health tra ve 200
POST /documents/upload nhan file PDF, tra ve 202 voi doc_id
Document pipeline: extract > chunk > embed > index thanh cong
POST /chat tra ve SSE stream voi tokens tu gemma2
GET /documents va GET /sessions tra ve danh sach co pagination
Schema SQL chay duoc tren PostgreSQL 16 khong loi
Qdrant collection duoc tao dung config
RAM usage < 8GB trong Phase 1 (khong co Redis, khong co reranker)
notes: Phase 1 MVP: KHONG can HyDE, reranker, strict guard, mode switch, memory tiers. Chi can basic vector search (Qdrant) + gemma2 generation + SSE stream. Document processing co the sync (khong can Celery) trong Phase 1. Xem data-flow.md de hieu pipeline chi tiet.

_completion.notes: Phase 1 backend hoan thanh. FastAPI + Document pipeline + Basic Chat SSE da chay duoc.
